interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 (SMS)) Hi NII, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/VG6L7RHU - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Together Loans

[Affordability Confirmation] To Wallette Foster,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Together Loans by you:

Borrower: Wallette Foster
IP: 169.254.131.1
DateTime (UTC): 02-18-2026
Stated Monthly Income: Benefits $763
Rent: $0.00
Bills: $0.00
Other Expenses: $150.00
Your Credit Commitments: $300.00
Together Loans Repayment: $177.130000
To be safe: $50.00
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $85.87


Yours sincerely
Together Loans Applications Dept

interactions.body:
((AI) CB ORANGE - Already cancelled (E)) [RE: ] Hi Tanis,

Thanks for getting in touch.

When you applied for a loan with us, we offered two different products: Loans up to $10,000 with a co-signer, and CreditBuilder which is a small loan held on our customer's behalf that customers make monthly payments against, building up their credit score.

I can see that you signed up for a Transform CreditBuilder account when applying for a loan of $5000, on 10/08/2024. We sent you a ‘Welcome to Credit Builder’ email on sign-up, confirming your account, how it works and how you can manage it.

Your CreditBuilder helps build your credit, even if you do not borrow from us. When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 1-2 years. Each month you pay $5, which we report to the Credit Bureaus as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the loan term is completed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

However, I can confirm that your CreditBuilder account has been canceled, so no further payments will be taken. If you wish to set-up a new CreditBuilder account, you can do so here https://tcrdt.com/s/O7NGFZ8H. CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. You can find out more about CreditBuilder here: transformcredit.com/transform-credit-builder/

Transform Credit can still help you access funds of up to $10,000 with the help of a cosigner. You can always access your application here: https://tcrdt.com/s/2MDRH617

If you need help, please let me know.

Many thanks,
Ben, Transform Credit

interactions.body: Hi Edward. Thanks for reaching out. Transform Credit is a cosigner-based lender, which means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. If you cannot find a cosigner, we can cancel your application if you prefer. You can apply again anytime! We can help you as soon as you find a cosigner. You can reply CANCEL, or use this link to continue when you are ready: https://tcrdt.com/s/XL6CXG0P If you have any other questions, just let us know. Thanks, Transform Credit

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : 0600003234023410081722] Hi Edward,

I hope this email finds you well. Do you need some help with your application journey? You can reply to any of our messages with your questions and we will be happy to assist you!

I can see that your application is active and you still have some tasks to finish before the loan is paid. Your current application contemplates a loan of $3000, over 36 months, paying back $137.39 monthly, but you can change these terms anytime before the loan is paid.

Transform Credit is a cosigner-based lender.  This means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them, regardless of the loan that you're applying for and your credit score. Normally, a cosigner is a friend or a family member who knows you (the borrower) and trusts that it is a good idea for you to borrow money. A suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 700 and a strong history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.

How does the application journey work? When you apply online, we will send you a unique link for your cosigner to register. As soon as we have everything we need from both of you, we’ll transfer the money. The money is transferred into your cosigner's account. This is to protect them, and us, against identity fraud, as transferring the money into their account ensures that they are fully aware of the loan.

You can check here more information about the application journey and common questions: https://transformcredit.com/faq 

To complete your application journey and check what is the next step, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/XL6CXG0P

Any other questions, please let me know.

Have a nice day,
Eden@TransformCredit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 (SMS)) Hi Mariecel, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/FJ1T2T9C - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 (SMS)) Hi Brian, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/TIIAK940 - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Together Loans

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 (SMS)) Hi Michael, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/GR7PF6A7 - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 (SMS)) Hi Joyce, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/2FR4GSDQ - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Transform Credit

((AI) BW GTQs - Don't have/won't provide GT (S)) Hi Joyce, Transform Credit is a cosigner-only lender, which means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. If you can't provide a suitable cosigner, we can cancel your application if you prefer. You can apply again anytime! You can reply CANCEL to this message, or use this link to continue when you are ready: https://tcrdt.com/s/5N7I2VB4 Thanks, Transform Credit

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : 0608261109120808283530] Hello Michelle, 

Thank you for your contact. 

I'm sorry, but Patricia wasn't a suitable cosigner at this time. We have a responsibility to make sure that cosigning your loan is something that they would be able to financially support and based on the information provided we don't feel that this is the case for them. We have sent them an email explaining the reason behind this decision. Don't worry though - the most important thing is we've already accepted your application and want to help you get the money you need.

You just need to find someone else to be your cosigner instead. As soon as you've found someone new, we'll check that the payments are affordable for you both and will then arrange to pay out the loan. When someone becomes a cosigner, it will be up to them to make the loan payments if you did not. Looking at their credit history, allows us to see if they've kept up with their own bills in the past. This helps us to decide if they would be suitable cosigners. A good cosigner has:

- A credit score of 750+
- A good history of paying their bills on time
- Homeowners (not tenants) are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time

To add a new cosigner please use this link: https://rgct.io/s/48EK66BT

Thank you, 
Transform Credit

interactions.body:
(Appeals Auto Response (GT)(Email)) [RE:I would like to appeal for my daughter, Krista Heeler] Hi , 

Thanks for contacting Appeals. 

We understand that it may be disheartening or concerning if you've been considered an unsuitable cosigner, don't worry though - the most important thing is that we can still help the borrower.

There are a few reasons we could find someone to be unsuitable - the most common being a less than perfect credit history. Being a cosigner is a big financial commitment, they are responsible for making any loan payments that their borrower does not. Reviewing all cosigners' Experian credit histories allows us to check that they would be able to manage any payments they are required to make, in addition to maintaining any other existing commitments. If a cosigner has had missed or late payments in the past, we can't be certain that being a cosigner s a good idea and wouldn't see them struggle to keep their other accounts up to date. Alternatively, If a cosigner's credit file is locked when they apply, we won't have been able to confirm either way (if this has happened with you, you can reapply as soon as your credit file is unlocked: https://tcrdt.com/s/QBUMTE67). 

A cosigner must have a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time (homeowners and mortgage payers are more likely to be accepted). It's important to remember that a cosigner can only be on one TransformCredit loan at a time too. If you'd like to review the information that we used in our assessment of your credit, you can check your Experian credit report/score for free at: https://www.experian.com/. 

In the meantime, the $0 will be reserved for the borrower. We'd love for their loan to add to the $9million we've already paid out to people just like them. If you have any other questions, you may find the answer here: https://transformcredit.com/faq.

Jade@TransformCredit

[Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: 0602280805012521123002] Thank you I appreciate your being willing to help , unfortunately I don’t
know anyone with a credit score of 750, and don’t have the time to look for
someone else. My mom was more then willing, unfortunately my step son just
passed away from an over dose of fentanyl and could truly use it but there
is nothing else I can do.

(Borrower GT Default (Email)) [RE:Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: 0602280805012521123002] Hi Krista, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 750
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/YQTIZDQZ

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit
[Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: 0602280805012521123002] I already did respond to your email.

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : 0602280805012521123002] Hi Krista,

Thank you for reaching out.

Your loan application for $5000 is canceled. If you decide to apply again, you can use this link to re-activate your application: https://tcrdt.com/s/N5V8X3KX

I can see you also have an open CreditBuilder account with us. By making the $5 payments each month on your CreditBuilder account, you'll be repairing your credit history. You can access your account here anytime https://transformcredit.com/CBServicing/login - you will need your email and SSN to login. 

Condolences, 
Transform Credit

(Borrower GT Declined (Email)) [RE:Welcome to Transform Credit Builder!] Hi Krista,

Unfortunately, your cosigner was declined because they failed to meet the criteria in our underwriting checks. However, this does not mean that you have been declined, and we can still get this loan paid out to you. We just need you to find a suitable cosigner, with strong credit and a history of making repayments on time. You can find helpful information regarding the cosigner requirements here: https://transformcredit.com/faq

Once you have found someone to be your cosigner, please send them this link to apply: https://tcrdt.com/s/QBUMTE67

If you are not able to find another cosigner, you can respond with CANCEL to close your application. You can re-apply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 (SMS)) Hi Walter, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/59R8XL3V - we'd love your loan to add to the $25million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

((AI) BW GTQs - Don't have/won't provide GT (S)) Hi Walter, Together Loans is a cosigner-only lender, which means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. If you can't provide a suitable cosigner, we can cancel your application if you prefer. You can apply again anytime! You can reply CANCEL to this message, or use this link to continue when you are ready: https://tcrdt.com/s/5KSGGIHF Thanks, Together Loans

Hi Tina,
If you have a joint account with your cosigner, you both will need to add a different bank account, which is active, valid, in your name, and capable of ACH payments.  We also remind you that online banks are less likely to be accepted since we are unable to verify the identity of our customers through these companies.
Unfortunately, they won't be able to proceed without accepted bank information. Would you like to cancel their application as a cosigner so you can add a different cosigner? To check your loan status, or to change your cosigner you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/5J8M09YQ
Thanks, Transform Credit

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 (SMS)) Hi Jessica, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/G5IQMZ9L - we'd love your loan to add to the $25million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Default (Email)) [RE:Let's work together to get your $5000 paid out] Hi William, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 750
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/1D8A0DTE

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Default (Email)) [RE:Need help finding a cosigner?] Hi Jennifer, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 700
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/F0JLGJF8

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

interactions.body:
(CB CANCEL - Specific email subject lines) [RE:CreditBuilder Payment Reminder] Hi Joseph,
 
Thanks for getting in touch.
 
I can see that you signed up for a CreditBuilder account AND applied for a $3000 loan on 07/12/2025. 

When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 1-2 years. Each month you pay $5, which we report to the Credit Bureaus as payment for a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the loan term is completed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, your CreditBuilder account is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. When you do find yourself ready, with the help of a co-signer, TransformCredit can help you access funds too! At which point, any CreditBuilder loan you have will be paid in full on your behalf.

You can find out more about the Transform CreditBuilder here - transformcredit.com/transform-credit-builder/ . However, I can confirm that I have canceled your CreditBuilder account, you will not be charged again. 

We still have your loan application approved for you. All you need is a cosigner, a friend or a family member who has a 750+ credit score and agrees to make the payment if you can't. Follow this link to pick up where you left off: https://tcrdt.com/s/A5XJ2WXY

If you need help, please let me know
 
Have a great day,

[Affordability Confirmation] To Katherine Twardowski,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

[Affordability Confirmation] To Porfilio Silva,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

interactions.body:
[Affordability Confirmation] To Porfilio Silva,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Rule 1 (Email)) [RE:You asked us to help with $3000 - and we can!] Hi Rudolph, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/WWEFFSQL - we'd love for your loan to add to the $25million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

[Your TransformCredit Loan : 033095HAND] IMPORTANT INFORMATION ENCLOSED - PLEASE READ

Juanita - You have failed to bring your account up-to-date, which means we have now made the ultimate decision to prepare your account for Court. As you know, your account has now defaulted and the full balance of $3093.15 is now due, payable immediately.  

We have been working tirelessly to avoid this situation from arising, but as the arrears were not cleared, we feel that the best option to take would be to file this loan at your local Courthouse for the full balance. As Jeremiah  has also failed to bring this account up-to-date, this Court Claim will be issued under both your names. 

Furthermore, as the account is now 45 days past due, we have also instructed that the Credit Bureaus separately mark both your's and Jeremiah 's loan accounts as Delinquent. 

Whilst we prepare your account for Court, we are giving you the final opportunity to Cure the Default by making a payment of $237.44, to bring your account up-to-date. 

You can call us directly on 916-999-5799, option 2 to discuss your account. This line is open from 8AM - 5PM CT, weekdays. 

Subsequently, if no contact is received, nor payment made for the amount of $237.44, we will proceed to file the Court Claim. Once this happens, no further arrangements can be made. Once Judgment is awarded, this will also be applied to both yours and Jeremiah 's credit files. We will also be enforcing the debt which can include, but not limited to, Garnishment, a Writ of Seizure and Sale, and a Warrant.

Thanks, Transform Credit

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

interactions.body: ((AI) BW GTQs - Can I get loan without GT (S)) Hi Velma, based on your situation, we require you to provide a cosigner. A cosigner shows us that someone trusts you to pay, and that we should too! This allows us to lend to you even if you've been turned down elsewhere. If you could get a loan elsewhere without a cosigner, we might not be the right choice for you. If you have a suitable cosigner send them this link, they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/2C4WX4PD Reply CANCEL to unsubscribe. Thanks, Together Loans

(Requesting lower loan without a GT (SMS)) Hi Velma, Together Loans requires a cosigner, regardless of the requested loan amount. A cosigner shows us that someone trusts you and that we should too, regardless of your credit score. A suitable cosigner is someone who has a very good credit history with no trouble paying bills in the past, and who can afford to make the monthly payments if you don't. Although they don't have to be a homeowner, it may increase the possibility of us accepting them as your cosigner if they do own their own home. If you need to update your loan amount or term, you can do so here: https://tcrdt.com/s/1OQJYBNB Thanks, Together Loans

[Affordability Confirmation] To Angela Jackson,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to charges of criminal fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

[Affordability Confirmation] To Carol Allen,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Transform credit Applications Dept

(GT - Email - settling loan) [RE:There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,
 
Your current balance is $4782.04.  
 
To pay off your loan, please follow: https://tcrdt.com/s/CP56WCMY

We will need to receive the funds within 5 working days to honor this figure. After 5 working days, the balance you need to pay will update to include the additional daily accrued interest. This payoff figure also excludes any other changes to the balance that may occur, aside from accrued interest, such as a returned payment.
 
Thanks,
TransformCredit

((AI) GT Confirming Payment - Pending payment - GT DD - Arrears (E)) [RE: There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,

There is a pending payment of $195.80, from your bank account. ACH payments can take up to 5 days to clear, at which point the payment will show on your account.

Will this payment be successful? This loan is currently 16 days past due, so if this payment isn't successful it's crucial the account is brought current immediately, to prevent extra interest accruing and avoid further escalation.

You can make a payment immediately here: https://tcrdt.com/s/DU3PCHBU or pay late here: https://tcrdt.com/s/NCWG5TDY

Thanks,
Mia, Transform Credit

(GT - Email - balance and statement of account) [RE:There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,
 
Your balance as of today is $4782.04. Please bear in mind that we charge our interest daily against the balance, therefore this amount will change on a daily basis.
 
You can access your statement of account any time via this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/906QEZBS
 
If you are looking to settle your loan, please reply  with "settle my loan"
 
Thanks,
TransformCredit

Funds must be received within five working days to honour the settlement amount and waive off any interest accumulated during this time frame. Otherwise, you will be charged for the account's interest accumulated during the time frame. 

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out. We're here to assist you.

Thanks,
Transform Credit

interactions.body: Hi Gregory. Thank you for letting us know you don't believe you submitted a cosigner application with us. We want to highlight that at Transform Credit, a loan application is created only when a consumer applies with their details through our Transform Credit website. However, rest assured that we do various checks, before agreeing to any loan, and a loan could never be paid out without first verifying the identity of the consumer. We also speak to all customers over the phone or video before any funds are released so it's extremely unlikely your details could ever be used fraudulently to finalize a loan. We can confirm that this loan application has already been canceled, and no loan is paid out. In order to further protect you, we have also added a flag to this case so that should the application be attempted again in the future, it will be automatically blocked from progressing further. If you have any more questions or need further support, we will be happy to help. Kind regards, Eden@TransformCredit

[Affordability Confirmation] To Jason Van Hemert,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

IP: 38.106.234.149

Bills: $500
Other Expenses: $300
Your Credit Commitments: $100

To be safe: $50

Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept
